LanguageData.ChemicalMunitionCompoundAprometheum.desc: Filled with mixture of potent but short-living version of prometheum.
LanguageData.ChemicalMunitionCompoundThermobaric.desc: Filled with mixture that disperses and subsequently ignites a fuel-air explosive mix, creating a powerful explosion and potentially igniting flammable objects.
LanguageData.ChemicalMunitionCompoundCryo.label: Cryo
LanguageData.ChemicalMunitionCompoundCryo.description: Filled with mixture of solid hydrogen and unstable compounds that vaporizes on contact with the air.
